◎简　　介  

　　I’m not at all surprised Syfy decided to renew Haven for a new season, but there was a fun twist to this happy story. Normally when the re’s a twist it’s for the worst, but Syfy must www. aiyoutv.com have been in a good mood when they were brainstorming how to mess with the series because it was decided to double the usual order of episodes for Haven. Now instead of 13 episodes...
